prompt: I want to add a dashboard to the Media section with a custom URL path of 'media-overview' and I'd like it to load before other dashboards. The dashboard should just show a heading for now. Put it in App_Plugins/MediaOverview/.
assertions: Manifest JSON has type set to 'dashboard'
Manifest JSON has meta.pathname set to 'media-overview'
Manifest JSON has a weight field with a numeric value
Manifest JSON has a condition with alias 'Umb.Condition.SectionAlias' and match 'Umb.Section.Media'
